mapper.sql: id, user_id, supplier_id, product_id, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_favorites (user_id, supplier_id, product_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_favorites (user_id, supplier_id, product_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_favorites WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM client_favorites WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_favorites SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE client_favorites SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
